notes: Captures the multi-squid arrangement and approximate mantle outlines from the photo, but internal marks are noisy photo-trace squiggles rather than FAO-style stipple, and arms/tentacles are largely missing.
specific_issues: noisy squiggle marks tracing photo highlights instead of clean stipple
arms and tentacles barely rendered — only small fragments on the right side
fins not clearly delineated from mantle silhouette
broken/jittery outline segments around mantle edges
eyes present but lack the almond shape and clear pupil placement of FAO plates
composition shows multiple specimens overlapping like the photo rather than isolated specimen view typical of FAO plates
internal contour lines appear to follow photo glare/shadows rather than anatomical structure
missing hectocotylus, suckers, and other diagnostic features that FAO plates emphasize
